FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class Modifiers

Namespace
FluentGpu.Dsl
Assembly
FluentGpu.Dsl.dll

Fluent per-element style overrides (React/Compose/WinUI-style): Button("x", onClick).Background(c).Rounded(8). Each returns a record with-copy, so any default style is overrideable inline without forking the control.

public static class Modifiers

object

FontWeight(TextEl, ushort)

Numeric font weight (WinUI FontWeight; the value IS the DWrite weight, e.g. 350 SemiLight, 600 SemiBold).

public static TextEl FontWeight(this TextEl t, ushort weight)

Parameters

t TextEl
weight ushort

BoxEl

Strong(TextEl)

WinUI BodyStrong is SemiBold 600 (BaseTextBlockStyle FontWeight, TextBlock_themeresources.xaml:13) — Strong() means SemiBold, not Bold 700. Use FontWeight(TextEl, ushort) or Bold = true for 700.

public static TextEl Strong(this TextEl t)

Parameters

t TextEl

Returns

TextEl

wrap TextWrap

TextEl
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
